name: Daily Events
DocType Event
Permission
DWL - Late Submission Flag
Attendance - Duplicate Prevention
Attendance - Recalculate Percentage
Weekly Email Report
script:
today = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.now_datetime()) week_ago = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -7) mentors = frappe.db.get_all("Mentor", fields=["name", "mentor_name", "email"]) for mentor in mentors: if not mentor.email: continue interns = frappe.db.get_all("Intern", filters={"mentor": mentor.name}, fields=["name", "attendance_percentage"] ) if not interns: continue table_rows = "" for intern in interns: weekly_logs = frappe.db.count("Daily Work Logs", { "intern": intern.name, "date": ["between", [week_ago, today]] }) hours = frappe.db.get_value("Daily Work Logs", {"intern": intern.name, "date": ["between", [week_ago, today]]}, "sum(hours_worked)" ) or 0 pending = frappe.db.count("Daily Work Logs", { "intern": intern.name, "status": "Submitted" }) att = intern.attendance_percentage or 0 status = "Good" if att >= 75 else "At Risk" color = "green" if att >= 75 else "red" table_rows += f""" {intern.name} {weekly_logs} {round(hours, 1)}h {pending} {att}% {status} """ frappe.sendmail( recipients=[mentor.email], subject=f"Weekly Internship Report - {today}", message=f"""

Weekly Internship Summary

Dear {mentor.mentor_name or mentor.name},

Here is the weekly summary of your interns:

{table_rows}
Intern Logs This Week Hours Pending Reviews Attendance % Status

Please review pending logs at your earliest.

Regards,
ITMS System

""" )
